This '''[[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]]''' [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] fought at the [[First Battle of Ruusan]] against the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] where she used her mastery of [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] to hold the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] off until her [[Death/Legends|death]], and the death of the [[Unidentified Selkath Padawan (Force choke)|two]] [[Unidentified Selkath Padawan (Force lightning)|Selkath]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] who joined her at the hands of former Jedi and [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], [[Kopecz]].<ref name="Path of Destruction />

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
